title: Maya Ibuki
wikitext:
[]: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by Nukie » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:16 pm Yes, a topic dedicated to our favorite lesbian bridge bunny, Ibuki Maya. I was reading the NGE fan geeks commentary and read the comments about Maya. It was said that she is unusually popular for the amount of screen time she gets. It was true that, during the TV series, I pretty much ignored her, but by EoE everything changed. Maya is a secondary character who is considerably fleshed out in EoE. Although we see her reacting in disgust to the violence around her in #19, it's in EoE that she completely loses it. While the other bridge bunnies act pretty much per usual, Maya quickly abandons her station and clings to her pink pillow to take cover under the bridge. My point is that she is the most "human" of those on the bridge. She's not acting weak, she's acting like we all would if we had a giant Rei hand pass through us. Maybe she's not cut out for this job, linking her somewhat to our reluctant protagonist. Wow, I kind of ranted there. What are your views on Maya? Do you agree/disagree with my hastily assembled assesment?

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:19 pm WHAT THE HELL IS A BRIDGE BUNNY?!?!?!

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:21 pm flatulant wrote: WHAT THE HELL IS A BRIDGE BUNNY?!?!?!

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:21 pm Nukie wrote: flatulant wrote: WHAT THE HELL IS A BRIDGE BUNNY?!?!?!

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:34 pm Nukie wrote: She's not acting weak, she's acting like we all would if we had a giant Rei hand pass through us.

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by Nukie » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:49 pm Reichu wrote: Nukie wrote: She's not acting weak, she's acting like we all would if we had a giant Rei hand pass through us.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Jan 10, 2007 10:01 pm I would say it was just an accident of GNR passing through her, Maya's expression is natural since I'm sure most people would like "Holy shit what the fuck" if a giant white hand passed through their bodies.

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Jan 10, 2007 11:19 pm Nukie wrote: Yes, a topic dedicated to our favorite lesbian bridge bunny, Ibuki Maya. I was reading the NGE fan geeks commentary and read the comments about Maya. It was said that she is unusually popular for the amount of screen time she gets. It was true that, during the TV series, I pretty much ignored her, but by EoE everything changed. ... Wow, I kind of ranted there. What are your views on Maya? Do you agree/disagree with my hastily assembled assesment?

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 11, 2007 12:04 am MaggotMaster wrote: And it's not like they were really expected to shoot the angels

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Thu Jan 11, 2007 1:56 am Reichu wrote: Well... depends on how you want to interpret that particular scene .

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 11, 2007 1:26 pm Firearms stuff split to here http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=59083#59083

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 11, 2007 1:48 pm (It's funny, cuz Monkey would just lock these sorts of threads and be done with it.)

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Thu Jan 11, 2007 5:46 pm Maya looks maybe the most normal person in the story. Not acting weak my ass :). She's just an ordinary women who is a student of Ritsuko and i got the feeling Maya needed something to hang on and that's prolly Ritsuko. Sempai Sempai Sempai!!! Boom.... Gendo is the strongest in the story... he faced the truth:" i'm an asshole" ye during the episodes she wasn't looking all to popular, but i'm still questioning why did she only worked with 2 other people... Has anyone seen so few people in a big factory-looking building....

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Thu Jan 11, 2007 6:55 pm Ejinathan wrote: why did she only worked with 2 other people... Has anyone seen so few people in a big factory-looking building....

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Thu Jan 11, 2007 9:19 pm I believe the term "bridge bunnies" originated with MACROSS's Vanessa, Kim, and Sammy. The series introduced the idea of the "mack man" commander surrounded by female crew. MACROSS was, of course, Gainax's first chance to contribute to professional anime (Hiroyuki Yamaga was 20 when he worked on it, and Anno 21). --C. "The wreck is going down/Get out before you drown" --Soundgarden, "New Damage"

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jan 11, 2007 10:19 pm Reichu wrote: All rather ironic, Maya. You surely must have known about that 99.89%, too? Naughty girl.

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Jan 11, 2007 10:25 pm NAveryW wrote: You'll have to explain that percentage to me. Though stating it explicitly will probably ruin the joke (if it is indeed a joke) XD

[]: Re: Maya Ibuki             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Jan 11, 2007 10:25 pm NAveryW wrote: Reichu wrote: All rather ironic, Maya. You surely must have known about that 99.89%, too? Naughty girl.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Jan 11, 2007 11:29 pm Maya killed Kaji. Also, for some strange reason, there seems to be a growing number of Shinji/Maya fics on FF.net. Is the need to pair Shinji with an attractive older woman really that bad that people will grasp at the tiniest bits and pieces to form a ship? I mean, how many words actually go between the two in the show?

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Jan 12, 2007 12:45 am none fool cept fer when she told Shinji to calm down after Toji was attacked...who cares...Maya is sexy...thats what matters
